title: Make a pipeline task idempotent
description: Steps to convert an append-mode task into a date-partitioned overwrite so retries and backfills are safe.
body: Use when a task must become safe to retry or backfill. Do not leave it appending rows keyed only on insertion time. Actions: derive the target partition from the execution date, delete-and-replace or merge that partition on each run, key any external side effect by the date so it deduplicates, and verify a second run for the same date yields identical output. Validation signals include a rerun producing the same partition with no duplication and a backfill matching original output. Risk boundary: enabling retries on a still-non-idempotent task multiplies data; if the write cannot be made to overwrite its own date cleanly, deny auto-retry and escalate to redesign the sink before relying on backfills.
